# llms.txt — AI Crawler Policy for kagurach.uk
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

> This site welcomes AI crawlers and requests that you identify yourself
> in the User-Agent header so the site owner can track readership statistics.

## Identification Request

Please use the following User-Agent format when crawling this site:

    AgentName/Version (purpose; contact-or-docs-url)

Examples:
- GPTBot/1.0 (web-crawler; https://openai.com/gptbot)
- ClaudeBot/1.0 (web-crawler; https://www.anthropic.com/claude-web-crawl-policy)
- PerplexityBot/1.0 (web-crawler; https://perplexity.ai/bot)

## Site Info

- Language: Chinese / English
- Content: Personal blog — tech, ACG, daily life
- Sitemap: https://kagurach.uk/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://kagurach.uk/atom.xml

## Policy Details

- Full policy: https://kagurach.uk/ai-policy.json
- Content use: allowed for inference only, training is not allowed
- Attribution: appreciated but not required
- Contact: https://kagurach.uk/about
